transcript: I gotta say that you guys got a real loud residence over there. I need you to tone it down tonight.
[delay] And I gotta say that you——Yeah, hello—
How ‘bout you, uh, slap me with $100 so I can get a hotel room? [dp]
Where do I—? Where do you live?
In the easement. Why don’t you guys just, uh, zipper-up tonight?
And you’re gonna be goin’ downhill real quick unless you straighten it out.
Well, I need to know where you are [unclear]
Put on your thinkin’ cap and do the right thing, here. [pitch-down]
[delay, pitch-down] —I don’t know what you’re thinkin— Lollygaggin’!
It sounded like you were chuckin’ spears up in the air last night. Oh! It was far out!
Jorje? You got any whores up in there? Whores for the hay? Hello?
Just shut ‘er down. You’re makin’ not a lick o’ sense—
Who the fuck is this? Who the fuck is this?
Who are you? I’m Jorge from Bogotá. I’m new to the neighborhood, here. But tone it down!
What are you, seven years old?
Hey, shut up and hang up the phone and be quiet tonight.
Dustin. I’m just over the easement right by ya. And keep it down at your place—
You got the wrong number, pal!
”Whadda you think of” what? I don’t even know what you’re talkin’ about. You talk about “the easement”—wherever. I don’t know what the hell you’re talkin’ about.
Where do you live? I’ll come over there right now, tough guy.
…so I can get a hotel room.
Well go stick your head in your pillow now, alright?
We’ve had our driver up there twice since Thursday for a COD parcel—
Yes, yeah, for a COD—[sped-up, pitch-up]
Uh, something went very strange with this audio, there, for a second.
Uh, we have a gate; there’s not a door, so y— There’s a number on the gate for them to call when they’re here. So if they don’t call us, we’re not gonna come to the gate.
And that’s because you have an audio problem. I understand that. ‘Kay?
I don’t have an audio problem. I just have an audio problem with you—
—rewinding and squeaking. So I’ve never had that happen before on any call before—
Yeah, I know. That’s why we’ve been out there three times comin’ up here, m’kay?
Okay, so you have to call us. If the phone doesn’t ring, we don’t know you’re there—
Okay, so are you here now?—
Your audio problems are causing all kinds of problems for our driver!—
Are you h—are you h—Are you here now? Are you here now?
I’m an Administrator, sir. Level 3 DHL, alright?—
Fantastic! So— So what do you need me to do? [stammers] You’re basically scolding me when no one has called this.
Well, fix your audio problem, number one, so our driver can do his job—
We don’t have an audio problem. The phone rings when people dial.
You can give us a call. You—you’ve gotten through to me right now, correct?
Yeah, well you’re rewinding and whistling. Can’t really make out what saying!
Hi, yeah, you guys got your buzzer fixed up ‘ere?
’Kay, ‘cause you told me it was defective a minute ago.
No, I didn’t—I didn’t say the buzzer was defective.
I said your call was defective.
And you said you’re under “critical mass” right now? Sounds like a critical mass on your intercom!
This is Mel with DHL Delivery. We have been tryin’ to come out there for three days since last Thursday.
Where? Where’ve you been trying to come?
Well I’m at the administrative office. I’m not a driver.
Where? Wait—wait, who are you trying—?
[quiet] It’s f— Uh, Black Satan City—
Who are you trying to deliver to? What individual?
And now, why has the driver had to come out three times? I’m not sure.
Probably ‘cause he doesn’t have the code to the door.
[quiet, simultaneous] [delay]—I’m not a driver——Eric?——package says. And now why—?
Oh, I see. I am looking at this pouch here. What I’m seeing—the pictures on this thing. It’s a little inappropriate.
[delay, simultaneous]—this pouch here——about three times. I’m not sure——This is un-freaking—
Why—why is there two people talking on the phone?
Just tell me when we can come back out for COD on this pouch.
COD? What is it? Who is it from?
[quiet] [delay, simultaneous]—This is un-freaking——I’ll—I’ll make an ex——So, just tell me when—
[delay, simultaneous]—I’ll make a one-time excepton——for COD on this pouch——I’m looking at——not a two-time—
[delay, simultaneous]—City CDs——I’ll make a one-time exception, not a two-time—
I don’t— I don’t really know what you’re talkin’ about, man. You gotta tell me who it’s from!
[delay, pitch-shifted, simultaneous]—real inappropriate drawings on here and stickers and things——okay, so tell me when——Satan Ci—
Yep. DHL Delivery calling. I’m calling for Eric, please—
What—wha—? Who are you—who are you deliviering—? And what is it?
There’s drawings all over the place.
Un-freaking-believable, the drawings I’m seeing on this package! [delay] Skeletons and just— Anyway, we’ve been out there. There’s a three-time surcharge.
I’m not paying anything, dude! You’re not telling me what it is.
Oh, I can tell ya exactly what it is [delay]; there’s skeletons and skulls and lotta inappropriate stuff on here—
I doubt— This is a prank call. So who’s the f*ggot now? Fuck you!
